Funded Elite 50% OFF Deal

Funded Elite is offering a substantial 50% discount on all trading challenges using code NEW50. This is one of the most aggressive welcome discounts in the prop trading space and provides an exceptional entry point into one of Italy's most trusted funded trading firms. Beyond the half-price challenge fee, Funded Elite also offers a legendary Free Retry Program — meaning if you fail your evaluation, you can attempt it again at no additional cost under qualifying conditions.

Funded Elite is an Italian proprietary trading firm that has built a high-trust reputation in the European prop trading community. The firm operates with a strong emphasis on trader support, transparent rules, and a quality-first approach that reflects its Italian institutional values. Funded Elite's use of the TradeLocker platform provides traders with a modern, responsive interface that supports sophisticated order management and analytics.

With code NEW50, your challenge fee is cut in half across all account tiers. The Free Retry Program is the standout secondary benefit — it removes the financial sting of failing an evaluation and gives you the psychological freedom to trade without existential risk to your investment. This combination of 50% off plus a free retry makes the effective cost of getting funded at Funded Elite remarkably low compared to most alternatives.

Funded Elite's trading conditions are delivered through the TradeLocker platform, which offers a clean and reliable trading environment. The firm enforces standard profit targets and drawdown limits with no hidden conditions, and their challenge rules are written to accommodate a variety of trading styles. The Italian high-trust background means the firm operates with a strong compliance culture and a verified payout track record.

To claim this deal, visit Funded Elite via the affiliate link above, choose your preferred challenge size, and enter NEW50 at checkout for an immediate 50% reduction. Be sure to review the Free Retry Program terms on the Funded Elite site to understand the eligibility conditions. This code is particularly well-suited for new traders making their first investment in professional prop trading.
